rationale.R1.2: The output walks the argument chain end-to-end by identifying and addressing multiple issues in the artifact.
rationale.R1.3: The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding text, providing detailed critiques and suggested revisions.
rationale.RX.1: All non-cosmetic changes are annotated with source and reason, such as the placeholders for CI values and inter-annotator agreement details.
